summary: Planning is complete for the first read-only Kontour Console foundation. The repo is docs-only today but already has v0 event/projection fixture contracts and examples; implement a small Node built-in-only fixture inspector/query skeleton without hosted services or action execution.
next_steps: Use .agents/flow-agents/read-only-console-foundation/read-only-console-foundation--plan-work-plan.md as the implementation source of truth.
Start with the repo-native Node loader/validator modules and tests before adding CLI output.
Wire a local command such as npm run inspect:fixtures to inspect docs/examples/event-streams and docs/examples/projections.
Verify AC1-AC5 with node --test, the inspect command, and a scope/security grep for forbidden action execution paths.
warnings: Do not execute action authority endpoint, command, or externalUrl fields from fixtures; they are descriptors only.
Do not add a hosted service, UI, product adapter, reducer that owns product semantics, or mutation of product-owned state.
Preserve Surface, Flow, Campfit, and other product authority boundaries from docs/specs/projection-schema.md.
